mapper.sql: ID, BUSINESS_ID, BUSINESS_NAME, BUSINESS_TYPE_CODE, BUSINESS_TYPE_NAME, PROC_MODEL_ID, PROC_MODEL_NAME, PROC_DEF_ID, REMARK, STATUS, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO BPM_BUSINESS_CONFIG (
) VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{businessId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{businessName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{businessTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{businessTypeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{procModelId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{procModelName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{procDefId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE BPM_BUSINESS_CONFIG SET
BUSINESS_NAME = #{businessName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BUSINESS_TYPE_CODE = #{businessTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BUSINESS_TYPE_NAME = #{businessTypeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PROC_MODEL_ID = #{procModelId, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PROC_MODEL_NAME = #{procModelName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PROC_DEF_ID = #{procDefId, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REMARK = #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
STATUS = #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE ID = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM BPM_BUSINESS_CONFIG WHERE ID = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM BPM_BUSINESS_CONFIG WHERE ID = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT ID_ FROM ACT_RE_PROCDEF WHERE KEY_ = ( SELECT KEY_ FROM ACT_RE_MODEL WHERE ID_ = #{procModelId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AND VERSION_ = ( SELECT MAX(VERSION_) FROM ACT_RE_PROCDEF WHERE KEY_ = (SELECT KEY_ FROM ACT_RE_MODEL WHERE ID_ = #{procModelId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) )
select PROC_DEF_ID from BPM_BUSINESS_CONFIG where BUSINESS_ID = #{businessId} and BUSINESS_TYPE_CODE = #{businessTypeCode}
